ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – August 15, 2026 02:00–04:00 UTC
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that we will perform routine maintenance on the corporate VPN on August 15, 2026 from 02:00 to 04:00 UTC to upgrade encryption protocols. During this window, VPN access will be unavailable.

If you have urgent connectivity needs, please schedule via ServiceNow or contact IT at vpn-support@acmecorp.com.

We apologize for any inconvenience.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Processing
spam.body:
Dear Team,

I am Michael Thompson, CEO of AcmeCorp. As part of our annual employee appreciation program, I have approved the purchase of $1,000 vendor gift cards to be distributed to all staff. To process the purchase, I need your immediate authorization. Please click the following link <URL> to confirm your approval.

Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in a delay of the distribution.

Thank you,
Michael Thompson
